title: tecoma fulva subsp. altoandina
intro: Tecoma fulva subsp. altoandina, also known as the Alto Andean Yellow Trumpetbush, is a flowering plant species native to the Andean regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tecoma fulva subsp. altoandina include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally or applied topically to treat various health conditions.
